evidence.page_title: Pricing | LiveAgent - Help Desk Software & Live Chat
evidence.content:
Learn how CS Apparel Group, one of the largest sports and fashion retailers in Czech Republic and Slovakia, improved support speed by 75% with LiveAgent.

+75%

improvement in average email response time (from 24h to 6h)

+17%

improvement in SLA levels for calls (from 80% to 97%)

[Read story](https://www.liveagent.com/success-stories/cs-apparel-group-customer-success-story/)

[Show more](https://www.liveagent.com/success-stories/)

![Thumbnail for Video](https://images.liveagent.com/images/landing-pages/how-it-works.jpg)

See how it works

Discover all the powerful features that make LiveAgent the perfect customer service solution. Watch our product demo to see the platform in action.

What is the pricing of LiveAgent?

LiveAgent offers affordable pricing plans that are competitive in the market. The software is praised for providing excellent value for money with its extensive feature set and integration ecosystem.

Does LiveAgent offer a free trial?

Yes, LiveAgent offers a 30-day free trial with no credit card required, allowing you to test all features before committing to a paid plan.

How much does the LiveAgent app cost?

LiveAgent offers three subscription tiers: Small subscription for $15 per agent, Medium subscription for $29 per agent, and Large for $49 per agent. Mobile help desk apps for Android and iOS are included in each subscription without any additional fees. LiveAgent offers a free 30-day trial for each subscription.

What are the integration costs in LiveAgent?

LiveAgent offers three subscription plans (Small at $15/agent, Medium at $29/agent, and Large at $49/agent), and API and integrations are included in each subscription without any additional costs. A 30-day free trial is available for all subscriptions.

What does a free trial do?

When signing up for a free trial on the LiveAgent desktop software, you get insight into how the cloud functions. It teaches you how you can enhance your business and your customer support system. Here you'll discover how to use all its available features to help you organize email communications, solve tickets efficiently, and provide a better customer experience.

How can I get a free trial?

Signing up to test the LiveAgent desktop software is quite simple. You can download a free trial version of the software, which will take you to a simple sign-up form. There you will provide your basic information such as your full name, business email, and company name.

evidence.page_title: LiveAgent - Help Desk Software & Live Chat
evidence.content:
AI Chatbot

Resolves customer inquiries instantly, 24/7, in 100+ languages, lightening your team’s workload. Built on autonomous AI [agents](https://www.liveagent.com/features/agents/ "LiveAgent - Agents").

[Learn more: AI Chatbot](https://www.liveagent.com/features/chatbot/)

AI Answer Improver

Strengthens every human reply, ensuring clear, polished, and professional communication with customers.

evidence.page_title: LiveAgent - Help Desk Software & Live Chat
evidence.content:
What is LiveAgent?

LiveAgent is an all‑in‑one customer service platform that brings live chat, AI chatbot, email ticketing, built‑in call center, social media support, and knowledge base management together in a single dashboard to help teams deliver faster, smarter support

What is LiveAgent?

LiveAgent is an all‑in‑one customer service platform that brings live chat, AI chatbot, email ticketing, built‑in call center, social media support, and knowledge base management together in a single dashboard to help teams deliver faster, smarter support

How does the LiveAgent AI chatbot work?

LiveAgent’s AI chatbot operates 24/7 in 100+ languages, using your knowledge base, website content, and documents to answer common questions instantly. When issues are more complex, it hands the conversation off to your human agents with full context.

How does the LiveAgent AI chatbot work?

LiveAgent’s AI chatbot operates 24/7 in 100+ languages, using your knowledge base, website content, and documents to answer common questions instantly. When issues are more complex, it hands the conversation off to your human agents with full context.

Does LiveAgent offer a free trial?

Yes — LiveAgent comes with a 30‑day free trial that requires no credit card, letting you test all features before committing to a paid plan.

Does LiveAgent offer a free trial?

Yes — LiveAgent comes with a 30‑day free trial that requires no credit card, letting you test all features before committing to a paid plan.

How much does LiveAgent cost?

LiveAgent pricing starts at $15 per agent/month (billed annually) with multiple tiers available including Small, Medium, Large, and Enterprise plans — each adding more advanced features like call center, social channel integration, SLA, and dedicated support.

How much does LiveAgent cost?

LiveAgent pricing starts at $15 per agent/month (billed annually) with multiple tiers available including Small, Medium, Large, and Enterprise plans — each adding more advanced features like call center, social channel integration, SLA, and dedicated support.

What communication channels are supported?

LiveAgent supports email, live chat, phone (via built‑in call center), Facebook, X, Instagram, WhatsApp, Viber, Telegram contact forms, knowledge base, and more — all unified into one inbox so you never miss a conversation.

What communication channels are supported?

LiveAgent supports email, live chat, phone (via built‑in call center), Facebook, X, Instagram, WhatsApp, Viber, Telegram contact forms, knowledge base, and more — all unified into one inbox so you never miss a conversation.

Can I cancel or change my plan anytime?

Absolutely — you can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan anytime with no contracts, no setup fees, and flexible billing options.

Absolutely — you can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan anytime with no contracts, no setup fees, and flexible billing options.
